'''Rinn Renado''' was the [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Gender/Legends|male]] leader of a corporate resistance movement on [[Metellos/Legends|Metellos]]. He specialized in guerrilla tactics and concentrated his efforts against [[CarsinShare]] and [[Nonsu]] targets. He saw Metellos as irredeemable and thus had no long-term goals, content with stirring up anarchy.<ref name="CCW" />

He sometimes recruited from the [[Gladiator/Legends|gladiators]] who fought in [[Ektra]]. Losers in the gladiatorial contests were dropped 1,200 [[Meter/Legends|meters]] from a [[Repulsorlift/Legends|repulsorlift]] spire, and Renado would occasionally position an aircar underneath to catch them. They were offered an opportunity to join the anarchists or continue their deadly fall.<ref name="CCW" />

Renado could speak the [[Wookiee/Legends|Wookiee]] language of [[Shyriiwook/Legends|Shyriiwook]].<ref name="CCW" />
